arts.ttl: Ally McCoist braces for Neil Lennon 'destruction' as Rangers hero takes his Celtic medicine live on radio
arts.sum: McCoist feared Lennon was about to destroy him when he brought up Celtic

arts.ttl: I'm a Rangers 9 in a row cult hero despite playing only 7 games and now I'm heading to Liverpool with Accrington Stanley
arts.sum: The Lancashire minnows landed a plum fourth round tie in a real David & Goliath fixture

Two of last season's Scottish Premiership top four meet in midweek, as Rangers host Kilmarnock at Ibrox with both sides underwhelming so far this season. The Gers continued their strong recent record...

arts.ttl: The stunned Fraserburgh reaction to Rangers draw as 'once in a lifetime' lightning strikes twice in Scottish Cup
arts.sum: Mark Cowie was in the dugout when the two teams last faced and can't believe he's getting to do it all again

arts.ttl: Dundee Utd star admits Rangers cheerleading role reluctance but can't argue with Jim Goodwin
arts.sum: Manny Adeboyega accepted his boss' call for Ibrox draw and was back with a bang against St Mirren

arts.ttl: Dundee derby & Celtic v Kilmarnock in Scottish Cup
arts.sum: Celtic host Kilmarnock, Rangers meet Fraserburgh and there will be a Dundee derby at Dens Park after the draw for the fourth round of the Scottish Cup.
